title: A Seasoned French Museum Chief Takes Over a Louvre in Crisis
author: Mark Landler
fullText: Christophe Leribault, who runs the Palace of Versailles, will replace Laurence des Cars, who resigned months after an audacious jewel heist.
summary: Christophe Leribault, who runs the Palace of Versailles, will replace Laurence des Cars, who resigned months after an audacious jewel heist.
